title: Activity Plus
description: If you've enjoyed completing an Activity Badge, go above and beyond the requirements and set yourself a new challenge on a similar topic.

tips.title: The Activity Plus badge is left blank with a grey border, as it can be applied to a range of different Activity Badges and Staged Activity Badges. You can place this badge underneath the relevant activity badge on your Scout uniform.
Ideas for Activity Plus targets for Beavers
tips.details:
- For the Gardener Plus badge, you could look after your garden or allotment for a further three months. Depending on the time of year, you could either plant or harvest different types of plants, and explain how you know they're ready to plant or pick.
- For the Cook Plus badge, you could prepare and cook another three dishes and serve them as a meal.
- For the Animal Friend Plus badge, you could help to care for an animal for a further six weeks. Explain why you give it the type of food and exercise that you do.

tips.title: Ideas for Activity Plus targets for Cubs
tips.details:
- For the Book Reader Plus, you could read at least another six books, then tell your group about them or write book reviews.
- For the Cyclist Plus, you could gain the Bikeability Level 3.
- For the DIY Plus, you could finish a DIY project that is more difficult than the example given.

tips.title: Ideas for Activity Plus targets for Scouts
tips.details:
- For the Pulling (Fixed Seat Rowing) Plus, you could take charge of a boat under oars.
- For the Meteorologist Plus, you could keep a weather diary for an agreed number of months.
- For the Dragon Boating Plus, you could compete in a national dragon boating competition.
- For relevant Plus badges, you could gain a personal or leadership permit, or an NGB qualification for the activity.

tips.title: Ideas for Activity Plus targets for Explorers
tips.details:
- For the Fundraising Plus, you could raise a further £500.
- For the Climbing Plus, you could gain a personal or leadership permit for this activity, and continue to develop your climbing skills for an agreed period of time.
- For relevant Plus badges, you could gain a personal or leadership permit, or an NGB qualification for the activity.
